narrative:
Lake township has 21,858 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
